title: [ImportVerilog] Make sampled value functions' results usable by Moore ops
body:
I've made the results of `$rose`, `$fell`, `$stable`, and `$changed` by Moore operations, inspired by @TaoBi22's PR [doing the same for `$past`](https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/9621).

I've also created tests in `builtins.sv` for each of those functions.

I don't have commit access so I'd appreciate help from reviewers! @TaoBi22 @Scheremo @fabianschuiki
